name: sales-prospecting
description: Build targeted B2B prospect lists with verified contact information, fully MPP-routed via the SELAT Router. Searches companies (Fiber), finds decision-makers (Fiber), pulls all domain emails (Hunter), finds a specific contact's email (Sixtyfour), verifies deliverability (Fiber), and enriches with company data (Brand.dev).

companyQuery.default: B2B SaaS startups in San Francisco with 50-200 employees Series A or B funded
companyQuery.description: Free-form natural-language description of the target companies (ICP) for the Fiber company search.

jobTitles.description: Comma-separated decision-maker job titles for the Fiber people search.

companyNames.description: Comma-separated company names to scope the Fiber people search.

locations.description: Comma-separated locations to scope the Fiber people search.

domain.description: Company domain used for Hunter domain-search, the Sixtyfour email lookup, and the Brand.dev enrichment.

firstName.description: First name of the specific contact whose email Sixtyfour should find.

lastName.description: Last name of the specific contact whose email Sixtyfour should find.

email.description: Email address to verify for deliverability via Fiber before adding to a sequence.

steps.label: all emails for domain — Hunter domain search (ROUTED MPP via SELAT Router)
find specific contact email — Sixtyfour find-email (ROUTED MPP via SELAT Router)
verify email deliverability — Fiber single email validation (ROUTED MPP via SELAT Router)
enrich with company data — Brand.dev retrieve (ROUTED MPP via SELAT Router)
